title: Simple Missles
description: Small mod that adds missles you can launch to any coordinates.
body:
Simple Missles is a mod that adds various missiles that you can launch to any coordinates

**TNT Missile**
a simple ballistic missile that explodes with the force of an ordinary TNT
![Tnt Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60e17d09f1c8b68067c718487d499e085c5b97b.png)

**Napalm Missile**
well, it's Napalm.
![Napalm Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abb80c144327172e630c8308c6bc13d8b652a700.png)

**Cluster Missile**
Bomb that launches a lot of smaller bombs when explode
![ClusterMissile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeaf7c660da1c476a6c7e45b551c07b593671f32.png)

**Omega Missile**

Most powerful missile (will cause lags!)

![Omega Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52466049c6e8301ac1fa4d5820192fe32e33ad88.png)

**EMP Missile**

![EMP Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e71daca7c674f25301656fdbc2eb2c396202a559.png)
